meaning: n.[生化]脱氢表雄(甾)酮,脱氢异雄(甾)酮
examples: The principal adrenocortical products are aldosterone, cortisol and dehydroepiandrosterone sulphate.
Objective: To investigate the relationship of serum dehydroepiandrosterone (DHEA) levels and female precocious puberty.
Objective To study the value of dehydroepiandrosterone sulfate (DHEAS) in patients with diabetes and coronary heart disease.
